context:
🔍INTEL
========
📌"Pure Extraction and Ransom" is the acronym for the group name
📌Appeared on 6th August 2025, but been active since June 2025
📌The group does not use AI in their website
📌The group is not a native English Speaking Country, but proficient in English
📌The listed victims are mostly from US, also targeted AU, NZ, DE
📌Victims are advised to contact via TOX as there is no dedicated Negotiation Portal
📌The leaks are hosted with different Onion Domains apart from DLS
📌The DLS is running on nginx/1.22.1 Server
💡DLS using CSS file "AposPanel.styles.css" which belongs to APOS Ransomware
